title: Silhouette Portrait Deal
excerpt: It's summer! Silhouette has a fun giveaway and promotion for you. To help celebrate the season, I chose a few of my favorite summer-y designs from various manufacturers, including American Crafts and made a little collage. Summer | Airplane |…
body:
It's summer! Silhouette has a fun giveaway and promotion for you. To help celebrate the season, I chose a few of my favorite summer-y designs from various manufacturers, including American Crafts and made a little collage.

Summer | Airplane | Sunshine | Watermelon | Ampersand | Globe Want to try playing designer yourself? Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition contains all the same functionality as Silhouette Studio® plus the following designer features:

  • Ability to open, manipulate, and cut .svg files

  • Rhinestone tools to convert designs into rhinestone templates and create your own rhinestone designs

  • Sketch tools to convert designs into several styles of sketchable art

  • Creative knife tools to allow you to clip designs using different patterns

  • Enhanced eraser set to modify designs with more precision

  • Built-in ruler and guide lines for precise alignment and drawing

Here are some videos to show how this software works - Basic vs. Designer Edition | Import Your Own Designs | Rhinestone Window

Visit Silhouette and use the promo code: TANGERINE through July 12 to get any of these: (1) Silhouette CAMEO® plus the Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition software for $269.99 (2) Silhouette Portrait™ plus the Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition software for $129.99 (3) The Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition software for $24.99

These are some great products! Please click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through July 12.

Now for the really fun part... Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette Portrait!GIVEAWAY: To enter: Leave a comment about your favorite part of summer. Giveaway will close on Monday, July 8th at 7am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after. Good luck everyone!

The giveaway is now closed. The winner is #294 - Heidi says: July 5, 2013 at 10:08 pm

I love going on long road trips in the summer since my husband is a teacher and gets 2 months off work!

CONGRATS!

UPDATED: These are some great products! Please click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through July 12.
